Simple API Documentation

Base URL: https://api.example.com

GET /widgets

Returns a list of all widgets available in your account.

curl https://api.example.com/widgets \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer TOKEN"

POST /widgets

Create a new widget. Requires a JSON body.

{"color": "blue", "size": 10}
curl -X POST https://api.example.com/widgets \
  -d '{"color": "blue"}'
